frame_analyses.description: Endoloop applicator visible with pre-tied loop, foam appendage with blue marks visible on white Penrose drain
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Setup appears correct with marked target on appendage

frame_analyses.description: Applicator being maneuvered, loop partially deployed
Loop fully deployed, approaching foam appendage target area
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Good loop visualization, appropriate size deployment

frame_analyses.description: Loop being positioned around appendage near blue mark
Loop appears positioned around appendage at target mark
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Loop placement looks accurate to mark

frame_analyses.description: Red-handled instrument (scissors) visible, loop being cinched
Scissors cutting suture tail, loop appears secured around appendage
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Clean cutting technique, loop maintains position

frame_analyses.description: Final cutting of excess suture material, task completion

penalties.description: Loop appears positioned approximately 1-2mm distal to blue mark

confidence_rationale: Clear visualization of loop deployment and cinching process. Some uncertainty in exact measurement of deviation from mark due to camera angle and mark visibility. Appendage integrity well-observed.
cannot_determine: Exact mm deviation measurement - estimated from visual assessment of loop position relative to mark
technique_summary: Competent intermediate performance with smooth deployment and appropriate instrument handling. Primary issue was minor positioning inaccuracy of loop relative to target mark.
strengths: Secure loop cinching without appendage damage
Efficient cutting of excess suture material
improvement_suggestions: Focus on precise loop positioning at the marked line
Consider multiple positioning attempts before cinching if placement appears suboptimal
